errors.gateway_unavailable: The payment gateway is unavailable, please try again shortly.
errors.too_many_attempts: Too many attempts, please try again in a few minutes.
errors.gateway_declined: The payment gateway declined the transaction. Check your saved card.
errors.payment_in_progress: Payment is already in progress. Finish it, or try again shortly.
errors.billing_details_required: You need to fill in your billing details before paying.

paidThroughBlock.trialHint: After your trial ends, we'll send an invoice due on the trial end date. Once it's paid, your subscription activates automatically.
paidThroughBlock.activeHint: At the end of the period, your subscription renews automatically from your saved card.
paidThroughBlock.pastDueHint: The payment failed. The renewal keeps retrying — you may want to update your card.
paidThroughBlock.canceledHint: Your subscription is canceled. After this date your organization loses access.

currentPlanCard.heading: Current plan
currentPlanCard.pendingActivation: You selected the {{planName}} plan. We'll activate it within 24 hours of the payment landing.
currentPlanCard.compNotice: Your organization has special terms. Contact support for details.

billingDetailsCard.heading: Billing
billingDetailsCard.monthlySavingsPrefix: If you paid annually, you'd save

paymentsCard.heading: Payments
paymentsCard.subtitle: History of payment attempts (ComGate). You'll find tax invoices above, in the "Invoices" section.
paymentsCard.empty: Payments will show up here after your first payment.

taxInvoicesCard.heading: Invoices
taxInvoicesCard.subtitle: Tax documents under Czech law. You can download the PDF for your records at any time.
taxInvoicesCard.downloadError: Couldn't download the PDF. Try again or contact support.
taxInvoicesCard.empty: You don't have any invoices yet. They'll appear here after your first payment.

cancelSubscriptionCard.scheduledBodyWithDate: We'll keep app access active until {{endsAt}}. After that, the pay gate limits activity — you can export your data at any time.
cancelSubscriptionCard.scheduledBodyDefault: We'll keep app access active until the end of the current period. After that, the pay gate limits activity — you can export your data at any time.
cancelSubscriptionCard.heading: Cancel subscription
cancelSubscriptionCard.bodyWithDate: After canceling, we keep billing until the end of the current period (until {{endsAt}}) — no one loses access right away. You won't be charged again. You can always export your data from the Reports section.
cancelSubscriptionCard.bodyWithoutDate: After canceling, we keep billing until the end of the current period — no one loses access right away. You won't be charged again. You can always export your data from the Reports section.
cancelSubscriptionCard.confirmHeading: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription?

choosePlanModal.consentRequiredError: You need to confirm consent to recurring payments to continue.
choosePlanModal.billingDetailsRequiredError: Please fill in your billing details.
choosePlanModal.billingSaveError: Saving your billing details failed. Please try again.
choosePlanModal.heading: Choose a plan
choosePlanModal.intro: After you choose, we'll redirect you to a secure payment gateway. Once the payment succeeds, you'll return here and your subscription will be active immediately.
choosePlanModal.billingDetailsHint: We'll use these details for your tax invoice. Filling them in is required to continue to payment.

billingReturnPage.successBody: Thank you — your subscription is active. The invoice has arrived by email and you'll find it in the Billing section.
billingReturnPage.pendingBody: Card payments usually confirm within a few seconds. Bank transfers can take up to a few hours for the bank to confirm — your subscription activates automatically and we'll email you the invoice once the payment is matched.
billingReturnPage.failedBody: No money was charged. Try the payment again, or contact support if the problem persists.
billingReturnPage.unknownHeading: You're back from the payment gateway.
billingReturnPage.unknownBody: The payment status hasn't been confirmed yet. Check the Billing section — invoices land there as soon as a payment is received.
